item.name: heading
item.label: Heading
item.help: Shared callback for login and register journeys (session intent)

item.name: login_text
item.label: Login prompt
item.help: Also secondary CTA after a failed Google register

item.name: register_text
item.label: Register prompt
item.help: Shown for login journey (not registered) and register journey (retry). Adjust copy to suit both or prefer one tone.

item.name: message_google_error
item.label: Google sign-in failed
item.default: Google sign-in failed. Please try again from the login page.

item.name: message_user_hidden
item.label: Account disabled
item.default: This account is disabled. Contact support if you need access.

item.name: message_not_registered
item.label: Not registered
item.default: No account for this Google email. Register with email first, then sign in with Google.

item.name: message_create_failed
item.label: Account creation failed
item.default: Could not create your account. Please try again or register with email.

item.name: message_emailexists
item.label: Email exists
item.default: This email is already registered. Try logging in with email or Google again.
